params.name: The Triumph of Bacchus
params.description:
On Sept 22, 1496 AD, Michelangelo completed the creation of The Triumph of Bacchus.
This sculpture is an early masterpiece by Michelangelo during the Renaissance period when he was only twenty-one years old. The sculpture vividly depicts the image of the god of wine stumbling due to drunkenness. A small boy is eating grapes beside him. The sculpture also features a lion's skin draped over Bacchus's shoulder, symbolizing mortality and the fleeting nature of life. This expresses the idea that t …
